title: P0: Stripe API uses removed/deprecated fields
description: lib/stripe.ts references subscription.current_period_start (removed in recent API versions), invoice.subscription (type changed), item.plan.metadata (deprecated), and createUsageRecord (deprecated). With stripe ^22.1.0 these may break at runtime. Fix: Update to current Stripe API types - use subscription.items.data[0].current_period_start, check invoice.subscription string type, use subscription_items.createUsageRecord -> reportUsage API.

title: P0: Verify Firebase ID tokens server-side
description: app/api/keys/route.ts:17 and app/api/user/route.ts:54 trust raw bearer header as Firebase UID. Anyone who knows a user's Firebase UID can read/create/revoke API keys and access billing. Fix: Install firebase-admin, add getAuth().verifyIdToken(token) to all authenticated routes.

title: P1: Quota burns on 403 feature-gate rejections
description: validateApiKey in lib/auth.ts increments quota BEFORE returning. Tool routes then check tier features and return 403. A free user hitting a pro-only endpoint still loses a quota call. Fix: Move quota increment AFTER feature-gate check, or add a dry-run/preview mode to validateApiKey that checks auth without incrementing.

title: P1: OTP webhook not multi-tenant safe
description: app/api/otp/webhook/route.ts:58-68 matches earliest waiting session globally with no user scoping. Two concurrent OTP requests from different users can get each other's codes. Fix: Add senderNumber matching or phone number scoping to the findOneAndUpdate query.

title: P1: errorResponse symbol collision
description: lib/auth.ts:150 exports errorResponse(AuthError) and lib/response.ts:7 exports errorResponse(string, number). Routes import interchangeably - shield/clean/route.ts imports from auth, others from response. Different signatures cause confusion. Fix: Rename auth.ts export to authErrorResponse, update all 15 tool route imports.

title: P1: Race condition in quota enforcement
description: lib/auth.ts:67-121 has TOCTOU race - two concurrent requests at quota boundary both pass the findOne check before either increments. Fix: Replace findOne + separate update with atomic findOneAndUpdate using  aggregation to atomically check-and-increment.

title: Fix lint errors and commit billing implementation
description: Fix unused var in billing.test.ts and setState-in-effect in dashboard/page.tsx, then commit
